title: Gya Labs Eucalyptus Essential Oil for Diffuser - Natural, Fresh, Cooling Scent - Eucalyptus Essential Oil for Aromatherapy, Humidifier, Skin & Candle Making - 100% Natural (10 ml)

What is eucalyptus essential oils good for? Eucalyptus essential oil, also known as aceite de eucalipto, may help to cleanse stale air, and instill a fresh aroma to spaces. It's refreshing scent also makes it a popular option in aromatherapy, and DIY cleaning agents to clean surfaces. How do you use eucalyptus oil in a bedroom? Eucalyptus oil, or eucalipto essential oil, can be used in bedrooms as a natural room freshener through diffusion. Diffuse 3 drops with water for 30 minutes, or mix with water in a spray bottle to make a natural air freshener spray to freshen rooms. Is it OK to put eucalyptus oil on your skin? Yes, eucalyptus oil can be used on skin after diluting with carrier oil as it is known for its hydrating and cooling properties. Apply 3 drops of aceite de eucalipto with carrier oil to cleansed skin and hair. What is the best way to use eucalyptus oil? We recommend using eucalyptus oil in aromatherapy as it’s the easiest way to enjoy its fresh aroma. Just add a few drops to water in a diffuser and diffuse for 30 minutes twice a day. Can I rub eucalyptus oil on my feet? Yes, eucalyptus oil can be applied on the feet, but it must be diluted beforehand. Just add a few drops with a carrier oil, foot cream or body lotion and massage feet until fully absorbed. Always perform a patch test first before use.
